---
title: "About"
---

These tools are developed for statistics courses at Gothenburg University. Each tool is a self-contained interactive site built with [Quarto](https://quarto.org) and [WebR](https://docs.r-wasm.org/webr/latest/), allowing students to run R code directly in the browser without any installation.

**Contact:** Lovisa Johansson · Gothenburg University
